summary: Handheld footage of a street demonstration outside a multistory building flying a U.S. flag. A crowd of people, many wearing masks and carrying backpacks, signs and flags, move across the road; some hold cameras. Later frames show haze in the air and broken chunks of concrete scattered on the pavement as the crowd disperses. A MostlyPeaceful.Media watermark appears at the bottom.

script.scene: A crowd with masks, backpacks and flags moves across a street in front of a building flying a U.S. flag.
Haze drifts over the crowd and broken chunks of concrete lie on the pavement as people scatter.
